international.note: Customer is responsible for any customs duties or import taxes.

policies.returns: 30-day returns accepted on unworn items in original packaging. Sale items are final sale.
policies.custom_orders: Custom engravings available on select pieces (ask which items). 2-week lead time. DM for a quote.
policies.gift_wrapping: Complimentary gift wrapping and a handwritten note included on all orders at no extra cost.
policies.payment: Venmo, CashApp, Zelle, and PayPal accepted. DM to arrange payment after confirming your order.
